allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Windows\\Fonts" | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "sim|msyh|yahei" -and $_.Extension -eq ".ttf" } | Select-Object Name, FullName | Format-Table)
Bash(python -c "from xhtml2pdf import context; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(context.pisaContext.loadFont\)")
Bash(python -c "from app.services.evaluator import METRIC_MODE_EXPLANATIONS; print\(len\(METRIC_MODE_EXPLANATIONS\), list\(METRIC_MODE_EXPLANATIONS\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast; ast.parse\(open\('app/main.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('main.py OK'\)")
